sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׁבּק

Transliteration: yishbâq

Phonetic: yish-bawk'

BDB Definition:

Ishbak = "he releases"
  1. a son of Abraham by Keturah and progenitor of an Arabian tribe

Origin: from an unused root corresponding to H7662

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
